name: Trengo Customer Communication API
what_it_does: Omnichannel customer communication platform with REST API for managing conversations across WhatsApp, email, live chat, Instagram, and more — enabling teams to handle customer messages from a unified inbox with automation and bot integration.
use_cases: Sending and receiving WhatsApp Business messages programmatically via REST API
Creating and updating support conversations across multiple channels from agents
Triggering automated message flows based on customer events via API
Retrieving conversation history and contact data for CRM synchronization
Building chatbot integrations that hand off to human agents via Trengo API
not_for: Pure email marketing without conversational support requirements
Developer-first messaging infrastructure (use Twilio for programmable messaging)
Teams needing complex ITSM workflow management
best_when: A team manages customer conversations across WhatsApp, live chat, and email in a shared inbox and needs API access for automation and CRM integration.
avoid_when: You only need transactional messaging without collaborative inbox features, or need developer-grade programmable messaging.

auth.notes: Bearer token from Trengo account settings. Long-lived token — rotate periodically. Account-scoped access. No OAuth2 — simple token auth. Webhooks include signature verification.

pricing.paid_tiers: Grow from $15/agent/month; Scale from $25/agent/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Per-agent SaaS pricing. WhatsApp Business API costs additional (Meta charges). No free tier beyond trial. Popular in European markets. Good feature set for omnichannel teams.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per account; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers contacts, conversations, messages, and channels. Webhook support for real-time event delivery. No official SDK — agents implement HTTP calls directly. Error responses include message and status code.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Message sends create new messages. Contact creation/update is upsert-style. Conversation state updates are idempotent. Read operations always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: WhatsApp Business API requires separate Meta approval and setup before use
No official SDK — must implement REST API directly with HTTP client
European data residency may require data processing agreements
Agent labels and routing must be configured in UI before API assignment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token auth. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. Webhook signature verification. Dutch company with strong European privacy focus.
